name: Google Cloud CLI
description: Installs the Google Cloud CLI (gcloud) for managing Google Cloud resources or using local emulators & SDKs.

datastore_emulator.description: If true, also install the Datastore emulator

firestore_emulator.description: If true, also install the Firestore emulator

bigtable_emulator.description: If true, also install the Bigtable emulator

pubsub_emulator.description: If true, also install the Pubsub emulator

appengine_go.description: If true, also install the App Engine Go SDK

appengine_java.description: If true, also install the App Engine Java SDK

appengine_python.description: If true, also install the App Engine Python SDK
